landing.title: Dynamic | Wallet Infrastructure for Fintech, Crypto, and Stablecoins
landing.text:
Dynamic | Wallet Infrastructure for Fintech, Crypto, and Stablecoins
We brought together 20+ industry voices to map the future of agentic finance. Get the full breakdown in our latest report!
Read the full report
Product
Product
Wallet Infrastructure
Onboard users simply and securely.
Stablecoin Accounts
Unlock everything needed for global stablecoin payments.
Server Wallets
Programmatically create wallets and move money.
Global Wallets
Turn your app into an ecosystem.
Wallet Connectors
Connect to 500+ external wallets across chains.
Deposit with Crypto
Use external wallets, exchanges and providers.
Platform
Security
Shield your app with layered protection.
Fraud Protection
Deter bots and manage threat vectors.
User Authentication
Manage users with advanced features.
UI Components
Craft unique and personalized experiences.
Money & Funding
Get money in and out of wallets quickly.
SDKs
Build with tools you know and love.
Solutions
By Use Case
Chains
Build an ecosystem with your brand front and center.
Stablecoin Payments
Enable payments with secure and scalable infrastructure.
Agentic
Power AI agents with secure wallets and payments.
Consumer Apps
Simplify onboarding and auth for consumer experiences.
Bridges
Infrastructure for building cross-chain experiences.

Careers

Live demo
Get started
Follow Dynamic
Get started
Wallet infrastructure that turns crypto demand into revenue
Grow your revenue by offering onchain products like Pay with Crypto, tokenized assets, yield and more. Quickly launch secure, non-custodial wallets without crypto specialists.
Get started
View live demo
Trusted by leading fintech and crypto teams.
Backed by the security and scale of

Read case study
Case study

Case study
Lighter
Read case study
View All Case Studies
Scale that's battle-tested
50M+
Users onboarded
800+
External wallets supported
< 1
Second signing speed
Crypto features your customers demand
Dynamic gives your customers the ability to trade, earn, pay, and move money on global crypto rails.
Trade
Expand what customers can trade from prediction markets to tokenized assets.
Earn
Offer yield on balances to keep customers engaged with your app.
Pay
Let customers pay with and deposit crypto from any wallet or exchange. No on/off-ramping required.
Move
Let customers send money globally, fast, cheap, and 24/7.
Designed for developers. Built for enterprise.
Build your way — from low-level APIs to full SDKs. Use primitives for full control or prebuilt flows to ship fast. Get sub-second signing and enterprise-grade security. Scale from concept to millions without rebuilding your stack.
Low-level APIs
Create and control wallets through APIs for programmable money movement at scale.
Learn more
Embedded wallets
Spin up non-custodial wallets in your app and let users start their onchain journey instantly.
Learn more
Wallet connections
Let users connect the wallets they already have across chains & platforms.
Learn more
One complete wallet stack
Dynamic is the only platform with embedded wallets, external wallets, and multi-chain connectivity in one unified SDK.
Built for security, engineered for speed
Security is the foundation of everything we do. From key management to infrastructure, every layer of Dynamic is designed for safety, reliability, and compliance.
Enterprise self-custody
Every wallet benefits from secure distributed signing, flexible thresholds, and built-in recovery paths.
Learn more
Fireblocks security
Dynamic inherits Fireblocks’ security expertise, practices, and operational rigor. Together, we deliver institutional-grade protection from custody to consumer wallets.
2,400+ institutions
$10T+ in transactions
550M+ wallets
Defense in depth
Our infrastructure is regularly audited by top firms and protected by a public bug bounty program.
Advanced authentication
Policy controls
MFA
Allowlists
Rate-limiting safeguards
Sub-second signing
Transactions complete in under a second. Users get speed and enterprise-grade security in every wallet interaction.
Recent audits
99.9% uptime
July 2025
April 2025
February 2025
September 2024
Ongoing Bounty Program
World-class teams build with Dynamic
Trade
We wanted something that just works. That means no seed phrases, no chain switching, and no waiting. You tap a token, you buy it. That’s what we built, and Dynamic helped make it all possible
View case study
Earn
We explored and started implementing various other embedded wallet solutions. Dynamic not only had the most secure solution it had by far the best developer experience. We had a working prototype in a fraction of the time.
View case study
Pay with Crypto
Through Dynamic, Stripe has made crypto pay-ins seamless for millions of merchants.
View case study
Trade
For our users, the experience from their first wallet connection to first trade is smooth. Dynamic is easy to integrate, supports lots of wallets out of the box, and the team is extremely responsive.
View case study

FAQ
Any questions?
We'd love to help
Contact us
What classifies as an "operation"?
For
Onchain Automation
, operations include common wallet actions such as  generating and backing up keys, signing, and recovering accounts.
What if I just need a wallet adapter?
Great! It is included in the free tier. There is no limit on the number of connect-only users within the tier.
What is the difference between connected users and Monthly Active Users?
A connected user is a user that used the Dynamic connect functionality to expose their public address to the app. An authenticated user is one that signed a SIWE message, proving that they are the wallet owner. You can learn a bit more about the difference between connection and authentication
here
.
How are unique monthly active users (MAUs) calculated?
A user is counted if they log in at least once a month or when an embedded wallet (including pre-generated wallets) is created for them.
When a user logs in for the first time, they are assigned a unique Dynamic ID. If they log in again, they remain linked to their original Dynamic ID and are counted as a single user for that month.
If the same user adds additional verified credentials (e.g., wallet, email, or social accounts) to their account, they still retain the same Dynamic ID and are counted only once for payment purposes.
Do you have any rate limits?
Yes, you can learn more in our documentation
here
.
I need a feature that I don’t think you support
Ask us. We are constantly adding new, powerful features to Dynamic. We’d love to chat! We are easiest to find in our
Slack community
.
I want to talk to someone before starting
We’d love to chat. You can
book a meeting
with us here, or talk to us in our
Slack community
.
Set up Dynamic in minutes
Free to start up to 1,000 MAUs
Create a free account
Talk to us
Made with love in
Sun

SoftBank Agrees to Buy Boston Dynamics From Alphabet

analysis.name: Dynamic
analysis.tagline: Wallet infrastructure that turns crypto demand into revenue
analysis.value_proposition: One unified SDK combining embedded wallets, external wallet connectors, and multi-chain auth so fintechs can launch onchain products without crypto specialists.
analysis.ideal_customer: Fintech companies and crypto-native teams (exchanges, payment processors, consumer apps) who need to offer wallets, stablecoin payments, or onchain yield without building custody infrastructure from scratch.

features.name: embedded wallets
features.description: Non-custodial wallets spun up inside the host app, no seed phrases for end users
features.evidence_quote: Spin up non-custodial wallets in your app and let users start their onchain journey instantly.

features.name: server wallets
features.description: Programmatically create and control wallets server-side for automated money movement without user involvement
features.evidence_quote: Trigger transactions, run contract calls, and handle complex flows without user involvement.

features.name: external wallet connectors
features.description: Connect 500+ external wallets across chains (MetaMask, Phantom, etc.) to the host app

features.name: multi-chain authentication
features.description: Auth and access control across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, Sui, and 100+ EVM chains
features.evidence_quote: Multi-chain auth and access control + 100 EVM Chains

features.name: social login
features.description: OAuth-based social login (Google, Apple, etc.) tied to embedded wallet creation

features.name: smart wallets (erc-4337 and eip-7702)
features.description: Account abstraction wallets supporting ERC-4337 and EIP-7702 standards

features.name: fraud protection
features.description: Bot detection and threat vector management tools

features.name: mfa
features.description: Multi-factor authentication with additional MFA options beyond defaults

features.name: step-up authentication
features.description: Trigger elevated authentication challenges at specific transaction or action points

features.name: bring your own auth / jwt
features.description: Accept existing JWTs from the developer's own auth system to link to Dynamic wallets

features.name: sso / okta support
features.description: Enterprise SSO integration including Okta for organization-level authentication

features.name: user management & analytics
features.description: Dashboard for managing users, viewing visitor analytics, and tracking wallet activity

features.name: on/off ramps
features.description: Flexible fiat-to-crypto and crypto-to-fiat ramps integrated into the wallet flow

features.name: stablecoin accounts
features.description: Full stablecoin payment and holding infrastructure for global payments
features.evidence_quote: Unlock everything needed for global stablecoin payments.

features.name: deposit with crypto
features.description: Accept crypto deposits from external wallets and exchanges without on/off-ramp friction
features.evidence_quote: Let customers pay with and deposit crypto from any wallet or exchange. No on/off-ramping required.

features.name: global wallets
features.description: Turn a host app into an ecosystem by enabling wallet interoperability across apps
features.evidence_quote: Global Wallets — Turn your app into an ecosystem.

features.name: global wallet kit
features.description: Prebuilt UI kit for wallet connection and onboarding flows

features.name: earn / yield
features.description: Offer yield on user balances to drive engagement within the host app
features.evidence_quote: Offer yield on balances to keep customers engaged with your app.

features.name: agent payments
features.description: Wallet and payment infrastructure for AI agents to send and receive funds autonomously

features.name: trade support
features.description: Infrastructure for prediction markets and tokenized asset trading within apps
features.evidence_quote: Expand what customers can trade from prediction markets to tokenized assets.

features.name: low-level apis
features.description: REST/HTTP APIs for wallet creation and control without using the full SDK
features.evidence_quote: Create and control wallets through APIs for programmable money movement at scale.

features.name: multi-platform sdks
features.description: SDKs for JavaScript, React, React Native, Flutter, Swift, Unity, Kotlin, and Node
features.evidence_quote: JavaScript / React / React Native / Flutter / Swift / Unity / Kotlin / Node / API

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-driven webhooks for wallet and user lifecycle events

features.name: white-labeling
features.description: Full white-label options to remove Dynamic branding from wallet UX

features.name: pre-generated wallets
features.description: Wallets created in advance before user onboarding for instant assignment

features.name: policy controls
features.description: Rule-based transaction and access policies enforced at the wallet layer

features.name: allowlists
features.description: Address and contract allowlists to restrict wallet interaction surfaces

features.name: rate limiting
features.description: Configurable rate limits as a security safeguard against abuse

features.name: device registration
features.description: Register and manage trusted devices to reduce re-authentication friction

features.name: content security policy (csp) support
features.description: Documentation and tooling to configure CSP headers for Dynamic-powered apps

features.name: bug bounty program
features.description: Public bug bounty program for responsible disclosure of security vulnerabilities
features.evidence_quote: protected by a public bug bounty program

features.name: security audits
features.description: Regular third-party audits of infrastructure; recent audits in Jul/Apr/Feb 2025 and Sep 2024
features.evidence_quote: regularly audited by top firms… July 2025 / April 2025 / February 2025 / September 2024

features.name: fireblocks security integration
features.description: Inherits Fireblocks' institutional custody security model for key management
features.evidence_quote: Dynamic inherits Fireblocks' security expertise, practices, and operational rigor.

features.name: distributed key management
features.description: Secure distributed signing with flexible thresholds and built-in recovery paths
features.evidence_quote: secure distributed signing, flexible thresholds, and built-in recovery paths

features.name: sub-second signing
features.description: Transaction signing completes in under one second

features.name: developer dashboard

differentiators: Only platform with embedded wallets, external wallets, and multi-chain connectivity in one unified SDK
Fireblocks institutional-grade security inherited at the consumer wallet layer
Sub-second signing speed with enterprise-grade security
800+ external wallets supported out of the box
No seed phrases required for end users
MCP server for AI-assisted integration directly in coding agents

praised: Dynamic not only had the most secure solution it had by far the best developer experience. We had a working prototype in a fraction of the time.
Dynamic is easy to integrate, supports lots of wallets out of the box, and the team is extremely responsive.
No seed phrases, no chain switching, and no waiting — Dynamic helped make it all possible.

free_tier.limits: 1,000 MAUs (consumer wallets) or 1,000 operations/month (server wallets); sandbox requires no credit card

tiers.name: Launch
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 MAUs/ops, multi-chain auth, social login, embedded wallets, on/off ramps, community support

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5,000 MAUs/ops (+$0.05/additional), smart wallets (4337 & 7702), fraud protection, MFA, BYOA/JWT, dedicated support

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10,000+ MAUs/ops, volume discounts, SSO/Okta, white-labeling, pre-generated wallets, premium SLAs, white-glove support

pricing.notes: Dual metering model: Consumer Wallets billed by MAU; Server Wallets billed by operations (same tier prices, same $0.05 overage rate). Enterprise gets volume-discounted MAU/op tiers and highest rate limits.
